title: 海浪空拍（清爽日光系）
style_note: 空拍海岸線與浪花，明亮通透、高飽和藍綠色系
negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, people, boats, buildings, blurry mess, deformed, low quality
prompts: aerial top-down view of turquoise ocean waves breaking on white sand beach, foam patterns, bright daylight, photorealistic, vertical composition
drone view of deep blue ocean with gentle rolling waves, sun glitter on water surface, minimalist, photorealistic, calm
aerial view of waves crashing on dark volcanic rocks, white foam swirls, dramatic texture, photorealistic, vertical composition
top-down aerial of shallow tropical lagoon, gradient from turquoise to deep blue, sandbar patterns, photorealistic, serene
aerial shot of long peeling wave along an empty golden beach at golden hour, soft warm light, photorealistic, vertical composition
bird's eye view of gentle ocean swell in open sea, deep blue with subtle foam lines, meditative minimal seascape, photorealistic
